nodes.context: Mexican drug cartel based in Michoacán, involved in the drug war.
Mexican guerrilla group active in Chiapas, fought against the Mexican Army in 1994.

edges.evidence_quote: provocando represalias por parte de La Familia Michoacana
edges.context: The Mexican Army's deployment in Michoacán provoked reprisals from La Familia Michoacana, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: el Ejército Mexicano se enfrentó durante 12 días contra la guerrilla del Ejército Zapatista de Liberación Nacional
edges.context: The Mexican Army fought against the EZLN for 12 days in 1994.
